_comment: OPTIONAL real per-GPU util/mem/temp via SSH. Key = a substring of the endpoint host. Value = [user@host, ssh_key] OR [user@host, ssh_key, "Display Name"] (the 3rd element is optional and just labels the card; defaults to the host). Requires passwordless SSH + nvidia-smi on that host. Powers the per-run hardware strip AND the always-on Live Fleet view. Leave the file absent to just use vLLM /metrics.
